useRouter();\n\n  const handleEnroll = async () => {\n    try {\n      if (!userId) {\n        // Store the current URL to redirect back after login\n        router.push(`/auth/login?callbackUrl=/courses/${course.id}`);\n        return;\n      }\n\n      setIsLoading(true);\n      \n      if (!course.price || course.price === 0) {\n        try {\n router.push(`/courses/${course.id}/success?success=1`);\n        } catch (error: any) {\n          toast.error(error.response?.data || \"Failed to enroll in the course\");\n        }\n      } else {\n \n  Eraser, \n  Square, \n  Circle, \n  ArrowRight, \n  Type, \n  Undo, \n  Redo, \n  Trash2, \n  Download,\n  Upload,\n  Palette\n} from \"lucide-react\";\nimport { cn } from \"@/lib/utils\";\n\ninterface DrawingPath {\n  id: string;\n  type: 'pen' | 'eraser' | 'rectangle' | 'circle' | 'arrow' | 'text';\n  points: { x: number; y: number }[];\n  color: string;\n  width: number;\n  text?: string;\n  userId: string;\n  timestamp: Date;\n}\n\ninterface CollaborationWhiteboardProps {\n  sessionId: string;\n  userId: string;\n  userName: string;\n  onPathAdded?: (path: DrawingPath) => void;\n  className?: string;\n}\n\nexport function CollaborationWhiteboard({\n  sessionId,\n  userId,\n  userName,\n  onPathAdded,\n  className\n}: CollaborationWhiteboardProps) {\n  const canvasRef = useRef<HTMLCanvasElement>(null);\n  const contextRef = useRef<CanvasRenderingContext2D | null>(null);\n  \n  const [isDrawing, setIsDrawing] = useState(false);\n  const [tool, setTool] = useState<'pen' | 'eraser' | 'rectangle' | 'circle' | 'arrow' | 'text'>('pen');\n  const [color, setColor] = useState('#000000');\n  const [brushWidth, setBrushWidth] = useState(3);\n  const [paths, setPaths] = useState<DrawingPath[]>([]);\n  const [currentPath, setCurrentPath] = useState<DrawingPath | null>(null);\n  const [history, setHistory] = useState<DrawingPath[][]>([]);\n  const [historyIndex, setHistoryIndex] = useState(-1);\n\n  // Colors palette\n  const colors = [\n    '#000000', '#FFFFFF', '#FF0000', '#00FF00', '#0000FF',\n    '#FFFF00', '#FF00FF', '#00FFFF', '#FFA500', '#800080',\n    '#FFC0CB', '#A52A2A', '#808080', '#000080', '#008000'\n  ];\n\n  // Initialize canvas\n  useEffect(() => {\n    const canvas = canvasRef.current;\n    if (!canvas) return;\n\n    const context = canvas.getContext('2d');\n    if (!context) return;\n\n    // Set canvas size\n    canvas.width = canvas.offsetWidth;\n    canvas.height = canvas.offsetHeight;\n\n    // Configure context\n    context.lineCap = 'round';\n    context.lineJoin = 'round';\n    context.strokeStyle = color;\n    context.lineWidth = brushWidth;\n\n    contextRef.current = context;\n\n    // Clear canvas with white background\n    context.fillStyle = '#FFFFFF';\n    context.fillRect(0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);\n  }, [brushWidth, color]);\n\n  // Update canvas context when color or brush width changes\n  useEffect(() => {\n    if (contextRef.current) {\n      contextRef.current.strokeStyle = color;\n      contextRef.current.lineWidth = brushWidth;\n    }\n  }, [color, brushWidth]);\n\n  // Get mouse position relative to canvas\n  const getMousePos = useCallback((e: React.MouseEvent<HTMLCanvasElement>) => {\n    const canvas = canvasRef.current;\n    if (!canvas) return { x: 0, y: 0 };\n\n    const rect = canvas.getBoundingClientRect();\n    return {\n      x: e.clientX - rect.left,\n      y: e.clientY - rect.top\n    };\n  }, []);\n\n  // Start drawing\n  const startDrawing = useCallback((e: React.MouseEvent<HTMLCanvasElement>) => {\n    if (!contextRef.current) return;\n\n    setIsDrawing(true);\n    const pos = getMousePos(e);\n\n    const newPath: DrawingPath = {\n      id: `path-${Date.now()}-${Math.random()}`,\n      type: tool,\n      points: [pos],\n      color,\n      width: brushWidth,\n      userId,\n      timestamp: new Date()\n    };\n\n    setCurrentPath(newPath);\n\n    if (tool === 'pen' || tool === 'eraser') {\n      contextRef.current.beginPath();\n      contextRef.current.moveTo(pos.x, pos.y);\n    }\n  }, [tool, color, brushWidth, userId, getMousePos]);\n\n  // Continue drawing\n  const draw = useCallback((e: React.MouseEvent<HTMLCanvasElement>) => {\n    if (!isDrawing || !contextRef.current || !currentPath) return;\n\n    const pos = getMousePos(e);\n    const updatedPath = {\n      ...currentPath,\n      points: [...currentPath.points, pos]\n    };\n    setCurrentPath(updatedPath);\n\n    if (tool === 'pen') {\n      contextRef.current.globalCompositeOperation = 'source-over';\n      contextRef.current.lineTo(pos.x, pos.y);\n      contextRef.current.stroke();\n    } else if (tool === 'eraser') {\n      contextRef.current.globalCompositeOperation = 'destination-out';\n      contextRef.current.lineTo(pos.x, pos.y);\n      contextRef.current.stroke();\n    }\n  }, [isDrawing, currentPath, tool, getMousePos]);\n\n  // Stop drawing\n  const stopDrawing = useCallback(() => {\n    if (!isDrawing || !currentPath) return;\n\n    setIsDrawing(false);\n    \n    // Add path to history\n    const newPaths = [...paths, currentPath];\n    setPaths(newPaths);\n    \n    // Update history for undo/redo\n    const newHistory = history.slice(0, historyIndex + 1);\n    newHistory.push(newPaths);\n    setHistory(newHistory);\n    setHistoryIndex(newHistory.length - 1);\n\n    // Notify parent component\n    if (onPathAdded) {\n      onPathAdded(currentPath);\n    }\n\n    setCurrentPath(null);\n\n    // Reset composite operation\n    if (contextRef.current) {\n      contextRef.current.globalCompositeOperation = 'source-over';\n    }\n  }, [isDrawing, currentPath, paths, history, historyIndex, onPathAdded]);\n\n  // Clear canvas\n  const clearCanvas = useCallback(() => {\n    if (!contextRef.current || !canvasRef.current) return;\n\n    const canvas = canvasRef.current;\n    contextRef.current.fillStyle = '#FFFFFF';\n    contextRef.current.fillRect(0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);\n    \n    setPaths([]);\n    setCurrentPath(null);\n    \n    // Add to history\n    const newHistory = history.slice(0, historyIndex + 1);\n    newHistory.push([]);\n    setHistory(newHistory);\n    setHistoryIndex(newHistory.length - 1);\n  }, [history, historyIndex]);\n\n  // Redraw canvas from paths\n  const redrawCanvas = useCallback((pathsToDraw: DrawingPath[]) => {\n    if (!contextRef.current || !canvasRef.current) return;\n\n    const canvas = canvasRef.current;\n    const context = contextRef.current;\n\n    // Clear canvas\n    context.fillStyle = '#FFFFFF';\n    context.fillRect(0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);\n\n    // Redraw all paths\n    pathsToDraw.forEach((path) => {\n      if (path.points.length < 2) return;\n\n      context.strokeStyle = path.color;\n      context.lineWidth = path.width;\n      context.globalCompositeOperation = path.type === 'eraser' ? 'destination-out' : 'source-over';\n\n      context.beginPath();\n      context.moveTo(path.points[0].x, path.points[0].y);\n\n      for (let i = 1; i < path.points.length; i++) {\n        context.lineTo(path.points[i].x, path.points[i].y);\n      }\n\n      context.stroke();\n    });\n\n    // Reset to default\n    context.globalCompositeOperation = 'source-over';\n    context.strokeStyle = color;\n    context.lineWidth = brushWidth;\n  }, [color, brushWidth]);\n\n  // Undo\n  const undo = useCallback(() => {\n    if (historyIndex > 0) {\n      const newIndex = historyIndex - 1;\n      setHistoryIndex(newIndex);\n      setPaths(history[newIndex]);\n      redrawCanvas(history[newIndex]);\n    }\n  }, [historyIndex, history, redrawCanvas]);\n\n  // Redo\n  const redo = useCallback(() => {\n    if (historyIndex < history.length - 1) {\n      const newIndex = historyIndex + 1;\n      setHistoryIndex(newIndex);\n      setPaths(history[newIndex]);\n      redrawCanvas(history[newIndex]);\n    }\n  }, [historyIndex, history, redrawCanvas]);\n\n  // Download canvas as image\n  const downloadCanvas = useCallback(() => {\n    if (!canvasRef.current) return;\n\n    const link = document.createElement('a');\n    link.download = `whiteboard-${sessionId}-${Date.now()}.png`;\n    link.href = canvasRef.current.toDataURL();\n    link.click();\n  }, [sessionId]);\n\n  return (\n    <div className={cn(\"flex flex-col h-full\", className)}>\n      {/* Toolbar */}\n      <Card className=\"mb-4\">\n        <CardHeader className=\"pb-3\">\n          <CardTitle className=\"text-sm flex items-center justify-between\">\n            <span>Collaboration Whiteboard</span>\n            <div className=\"flex items-center gap-2\">\n              <Button variant=\"ghost\" size=\"sm\" onClick={undo} disabled={historyIndex <= 0}>\n                <Undo className=\"h-4 w-4\" />\n              </Button>\n              <Button variant=\"ghost\" size=\"sm\" onClick={redo} disabled={historyIndex >= history.length - 1}>\n                <Redo className=\"h-4 w-4\" />\n              </Button>\n              <Button variant=\"ghost\" size=\"sm\" onClick={clearCanvas}>\n                <Trash2 className=\"h-4 w-4\" />\n              </Button>\n              <Button variant=\"ghost\" size=\"sm\" onClick={downloadCanvas}>\n                <Download className=\"h-4 w-4\" />\n              </Button>\n            </div>\n          </CardTitle>\n        </CardHeader>\n        <CardContent className=\"space-y-3\">\n          {/* Tools */}\n          <div className=\"flex items-center gap-2\">\n            <Button\n              variant={tool === 'pen' ? 'default' : 'outline'}\n              size=\"sm\"\n              onClick={() => setTool('pen')}\n            >\n              <Pen className=\"h-4 w-4\" />\n            </Button>\n            <Button\n              variant={tool === 'eraser' ? 'default' : 'outline'}\n              size=\"sm\"\n              onClick={() => setTool('eraser')}\n            >\n              <Eraser className=\"h-4 w-4\" />\n            </Button>\n            <Button\n              variant={tool === 'rectangle' ? 'default' : 'outline'}\n              size=\"sm\"\n              onClick={() => setTool('rectangle')}\n            >\n              <Square className=\"h-4 w-4\" />\n            </Button>\n            <Button\n              variant={tool === 'circle' ? 'default' : 'outline'}\n              size=\"sm\"\n              onClick={() => setTool('circle')}\n            >\n              <Circle className=\"h-4 w-4\" />\n            </Button>\n            <Button\n              variant={tool === 'arrow' ? 'default' : 'outline'}\n              size=\"sm\"\n              onClick={() => setTool('arrow')}\n            >\n              <ArrowRight className=\"h-4 w-4\" />\n            </Button>\n            <Button\n              variant={tool === 'text' ? 'default' : 'outline'}\n              size=\"sm\"\n              onClick={() => setTool('text')}\n            >\n              <Type className=\"h-4 w-4\" />\n            </Button>\n          </div>\n\n          {/* Color Palette */}\n          <div className=\"flex items-center gap-2\">\n            <Palette className=\"h-4 w-4 text-gray-500\" />\n            <div className=\"flex      className={cn(\n                    \"w-6 h-6 rounded border-2 transition-all\",\n                    color === colorOption ? \"border-gray-900 scale-110\" : \"border-gray-300\"\n                  )}\n                  style={{ backgroundColor: colorOption }}\n                />\n              ))}\n              <input\n                type=\"color\"\n                value={color}\n                onChange={(e) => setColor(e.target.value)}\n                className=\"w-6 h-6 rounded border-2 border-gray-300\"\n              />\n            </div>\n          </div>\n\n          {/* Brush Width */}\n          <div className=\"flex items-center gap-3\">\n            <span className=\"text-sm text-gray-600\">Size:</span>\n            <Slider\n              value={[brushWidth]}\n              onValueChange={(value) => setBrushWidth(value[0])}\n              max={20}\n              min={1}\n              step={1}\n              className=\"flex-1\"\n            />\n            <span className=\"text-sm text-gray-600 w-8\">{brushWidth}px</span>\n          </div>\n        </CardContent>\n      </Card>\n\n      {/* Canvas */}\n      <div className=\"flex-1 border border-gray-200 dark:border-gray-700 rounded-lg overflow-hidden bg-white\">\n        <canvas\n          ref={canvasRef}\n          className=\"w-full h-full cursor-crosshair\"\n          onMouseDown={startDrawing}\n  }\n        }\n      });\n\n      if (response.data.success) {\n        setPersonalizationInsights(response.data.data.insights);\n        if (response.data.data.studyBuddy) {\n      }\n      }\n    } catch (error: any) {\n      logger.error(\"Failed to load personalization data:\", error);\n      // Use demo data as fallback\n      setPersonalizationInsights(getDemoInsights());\n      setStudyBuddy(getDemoStudyBuddy());\n    } finally {\n      setIsLoadingInsights(false);\n    }\n  }, [user.id, courseId, sectionId, currentSection.videoUrl ? 10 : 5; // 10 min for videos, 5 min for text\n    return baseTime;\n  }, [currentSection.duration, currentSection.videoUrl]);\n\n  // Handle section completion\n  const window.location.reload();\n      }\n    } catch (error: any) {\n      logger.error('Error marking section complete:', error);\n    }\n  }, [courseId, chapterId, sectionId]);\n\n  // Memoize expensive calculations\n  const progressPercentage = useMemo(() => {\n    return totalSections > 0 ? (completedCount / chapter.sections.length) * 100 \n        : 0;\n      \n      return {\n        ...chapter,\n        completedSections: completedCount,\n        progressPercentage,\n        isCurrentChapter: chapter.id === chapterId,\n      };\n    });\n  }, [courseChapters, chapterId]);\n\n  // Load personalization data from SAM engine\n  // Update learning preferences\n  const updatePreferences = useCallback(async (newPreferences: Partial<LearningPreferences>) => {\n    const updated = { ...learningPreferences, ...newPreferences };\n    setLearningPreferences(updated);\n    \n    try {\n      await axios.post(\"/api/sam/personalization\", {\n        action: \"update-preferences\",\n        data: {\n          userId: user.id,\n          preferences: updated\n        }\n      });\n      toast.success(\"Learning preferences updated!\");\n    } catch (error: any) {\n      logger.error(\"Failed to update preferences:\", error);\n      toast.error(\"Failed to update preferences\");\n    }\n  }, [learningPreferences, user.id]);\n\n  // Trigger adaptive content adjustment\n  const triggerAdaptiveAdjustment = useCallback(async (feedback: {\n    difficulty: 'too-easy' | 'too-hard' | 'just-right';\n    engagement: number;\n    understanding: number;\n  }) => {\n    try {\n      await axios.post(\"/api/sam/personalization\", {\n        action: \"adaptive-feedback\",\n        data: {\n          userId: user.id,\n          courseId,\n          sectionId,\n          feedback,\n          currentTime: new Date().toISOString()\n        }\n      });\n      \n      // Reload insights after feedback\n      setTimeout(() => loadPersonalizationData(), 1000);\n      toast.success(\"Thanks for your feedback! courseId, sectionId, loadPersonalizationData]);\n\n  const getContentIcon = useCallback((type?: string | null) => {\n    switch (type) {\n      case \"video\":\n        return <Video className=\"w-4 h-4 text-red-500\" />;\n      case \"article\":\n        return <FileText className=\"w-4 h-4 text-blue-500\" />;\n      case \"code\":\n        return <Code className=\"w-4 h-4 text-green-500\" />;\n      default:\n        return <BookOpen className=\"w-4 h-4 text-gray-500\" />;\n    }\n  }, []);\n\n  const getLearningStyleIcon = (style: string) => {\n    switch (style.toLowerCase()) {\n      case 'visual': return <Eye className=\"w-4 h-4\" />;\n      case 'auditory': return <Volume2 className=\"w-4 h-4\" />;\n      case 'kinesthetic': return <Gamepad2 className=\"w-4 h-4\" />;\n      case 'reading': return <BookOpen className=\"w-4 h-4\" />;\n      default: return <Brain className=\"w-4 h-4\" />;\n    }\n  };\n\n  const getPersonalityIcon = (personality: string) => {\n    switch <Palette className=\"w-4 h-4\" />;\n      case 'practical': return <Target className=\"w-4 h-4\" />;\n      default: return <Users className=\"w-4 h-4\" />;\n    }\n  };\n\n  return (\n    <div [isVisible]);\n\n  if (!showFeedback) return null;\n\n  const handleFeedback = (difficulty: string, engagement: number) => {\n    onFeedback({\n      difficulty,\n      engagement,\n      understanding: engagement // Simplified for demo\n    });\n    setShowFeedback(false);\n  };\n\n  return (\n    <AnimatePresence>\n      <motion.div\n        initial={{ opacity: 0, y: 100 }}\n        animate={{ opacity: 1, y: 0 }}\n        exit={{ opacity: 0, y: 100 }}\n        className=\"fixed bottom-4 right-4 z-50\"\n      >\n        <Card className=\"w-80 bg-white/95 dark:bg-slate-900/95         <Brain className=\"w-4 h-4 text-purple-600\" />\n              How&apos;s it going?\n              <Button\n                variant=\"ghost\"\n                size=\"sm\"\n                onClick={() => setShowFeedback(false)}\n                className=\"ml-auto p-1 h-auto\"\n              >\n                <X className=\"w-3 h-3\" />\n              </Button>\n            </CardTitle>\n          </CardHeader>\n          <CardContent className=\"space-y-3\">\n            <p className=\"text-xs text-slate-600 dark:text-slate-400\">\n              Help us adapt the <div className=\"flex gap-2\">\n                <Button\n                  size=\"sm\"\n                  variant=\"outline\"\n                  onClick={() => handleFeedback('too-easy', 7)}\n                  className=\"text-xs\"\n                >\n                  Too Easy\n                </Button>\n                <Button\n                  size=\"sm\"\n                  variant=\"outline\"\n                  onClick={() => handleFeedback('just-right', 8)}\n                  className=\"text-xs\"\n                >\n                  Just Right\n                </Button>\n                <Button\n                  size=\"sm\"\n                  variant=\"outline\"\n                  onClick={() => handleFeedback('too-hard', 5)}\n                  className=\"text-xs\"\n                >\n                  Too Hard\n                </Button>\n              </div>\n            </div>\n          </CardContent>\n        </Card>\n      </motion.div>\n    </AnimatePresence>\n  );\n};\n\n// Demo data functions\nfunction getDemoInsights(): PersonalizationInsights {\n  return {\n    learningStyle: {\n      type: 'Visual',\n Target, \n  TrendingUp, \n  Lightbulb, \n  BarChart3,\n  BookOpen,\n  Clock,\n  Trophy,\n  AlertCircle,\n  CheckCircle,\n  ArrowRight,\n  Sparkles,\n  Activity,\n  Zap,\n  Star,\n  RefreshCw,\n AssessmentAnalysis {\n  overallPerformance: {\n    totalAttempts: number;\n    averageScore: number;\n    improvement: number;\n    consistency: number;\n    trend: string;\n  };\n  cognitiveLevels: };\n}\n\ninterface AdaptiveQuestion {\n  id: string;\n  type: string;\n  difficulty: string;\n  bloomsLevel: string;\n  question: string;\n  options?: string[];\n  correctAnswer: string;\n  explanation: string;\n  points: number;\n  learningObjective: string;\n  scaffolding?: string;\n}\n\nexport const AdaptiveAssessmentContent = ({ sectionId, courseId, chapterId }: AdaptiveAssessmentContentProps) => {\n  const [analysis, setAnalysis] = useState<AssessmentAnalysis | null>(null);\n  const [adaptiveQuestions, setAdaptiveQuestions] = useState<AdaptiveQuestion[]>([]);\n  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);\n  const [analyzing, setAnalyzing] = useState(false);\n  const [generatingQuestions, setGeneratingQuestions] = useState(false);\n  const [activeView, setActiveView] = useState<\"overview\" | \"cognitive\" | \"recommendations\" | \"practice\">(\"overview\");\n\n  const fetchAnalysis = useCallback(async () => {\n    try {\n      setLoading(true);\n      const response = await fetch('/api/adaptive-assessment/analyze', {\n        method: 'POST',\n        headers: {\n          'Content-Type': 'application/json',\n        },\n        body: JSON.stringify({ sectionId }),\n      });\n\n      if (response.ok) {\n        const data = await response.json();\n        setAnalysis(data.analysis);\n      } else {\n        toast.error('Failed to load assessment analysis');\n      }\n    } catch (error: any) {\n      logger.error('Error fetching analysis:', error);\n      toast.error('Failed to load assessment analysis');\n    } finally {\n      setLoading(false);\n    }\n  }, [sectionId]);\n\n  useEffect(() => {\n    fetchAnalysis();\n  }, [fetchAnalysis]);\n\n  const fetch('/api/adaptive-assessment/recommend-questions', {\n        method: 'POST',\n        headers: {\n          'Content-Type': 'application/json',\n        },\n        body: JSON.stringify({ \n          sectionId, \n          focusMode,\n          questionCount: 5 \n        }),\n      });\n\n      if (response.ok) {\n        const data = await response.json();\n        setAdaptiveQuestions(data.questions);\n        setActiveView('practice');\n        toast.success(`Generated ${data.questions.length} adaptive questions!`);\n      } else {\n        toast.error('Failed finally {\n      setGeneratingQuestions(false);\n    }\n  };\n\n  const refreshAnalysis = async () => {\n    setAnalyzing(true);\n    await fetchAnalysis();\n    setAnalyzing(false);\n    toast.success('Analysis refreshed!');\n  };\n\n  const getBloomsColor = (level: string) => {\n    const colors = {\n      'REMEMBER': 'bg-blue-100 text-blue-700 border-blue-200',\n      'UNDERSTAND': 'bg-green-100 text-green-700 border-green-200',\n      'APPLY': 'bg-yellow-100 text-yellow-700 border-yellow-200',\n      'ANALYZE': 'bg-orange-100 text-orange-700 border-orange-200',\n      'EVALUATE': 'bg-red-100 text-red-700 border-red-200',\n      'CREATE': 'bg-purple-100 text-purple-700 border-purple-200'\n    };\n    return colors[level as keyof typeof colors] || 'bg-gray-100 text-gray-700 border-gray-200';\n  };\n\n  const getPriorityColor = (priority: string) => {\n    switch (priority) {\n      case 'high': return 'border-l-red-500 bg-red-50';\n      case 'medium': return 'border-l-yellow-500 bg-yellow-50';\n      case 'low': return 'border-l-green-500 bg-green-50';\n      default: return 'border-l-gray-500 bg-gray-50';\n    }\n  };\n\n  if (loading) {\n    return (\n      <div className=\"flex items-center justify-center py-12\">\n        <div className=\"animate-spin rounded-full h-8 w-8 border-b-2 border-blue-600\"></div>\n      </div>\n    );\n  }\n\n  if (!analysis) {\n    return (\n      <div className=\"text-center py-12\">\n        <Brain className=\"w-16 h-16 text-slate-400 mx-auto mb-4\" />\n        <h3 className=\"text-lg font-semibold        <h2 className=\"text-2xl font-bold text-slate-900 dark:text-slate-100 mb-2\">\n            Adaptive Assessment\n          </h2>\n          <p className=\"text-slate-600 dark:text-slate-400\">\n            AI-powered learning insights and personalized recommendations\n          </p>\n        </div>\n        <Button\n          onClick={refreshAnalysis}\n          disabled={analyzing}\n          variant=\"outline\"\n          size=\"sm\"\n        >\n          <RefreshCw className={cn(\"w-4 h-4 mr-2\", analyzing && \"animate-spin\")} />\n          Refresh Analysis\n        </Button>\n             {/* Difficulty Breakdown */}\n                    <div className=\"grid grid-cols-3 gap-2 text-xs\">\n                      <div className=\"text-center\">\n                        <p };\n\n  const handleBlogClick = (blog: any) => {\n    // You can implement blog URL logic here - for now opening a placeholder\n    const blogUrl = blog.url || `#blog-${blog.id}`;\n \n      switch (sortBy) {\n        case 'title':\n          comparison = a.title.localeCompare(b.title);\n          break;\n        case 'date':\n          const dateA = a.publishedAt ? new Date(a.publishedAt).getTime() : 0;\n          const dateB = b.publishedAt ? new Date(b.publishedAt).getTime() : 0;\n          comparison = dateA - dateB;\n          break;\n        case 'readTime':\n    }\n  ].filter(item => item.count > 0);\n\n  // Set recommended content type based on learning preferences\n  useEffect(() => {\n    const recommendedContent = availableContent.find(item => item.recommended);\n    if (recommendedContent) {\n      setActiveContentTab(recommendedContent.id as ContentSubTab);\n    } else if (availableContent.length > 0) {\n      setActiveContentTab(availableContent[0].id as ContentSubTab);\n    }\n  }, [preferences.contentFormat, currentSection.id, availableContent]);\n\n  const generateAdaptiveRecommendations =   'Use diagrams and visual aids when available',\n          'Take screenshot notes of important concepts'\n        ];\n        break;\n      case 'auditory':\n        baseRecommendations.suggestedOrder = ['videos', 'articles', 'blogs', 'code'];\n        baseRecommendations.personalizedTips = [\n          'Listen to video explanations first',\n          'Use 'videos'];\n        baseRecommendations.personalizedTips = [\n          'Read comprehensive articles first',\n          'Take detailed written notes',\n          'Use code examples to reinforce [\n          'Start with hands-on coding exercises',\n          'Practice immediately after learning',\n          'Build small projects to apply concepts'\n        ];\n        break;\n      default:\n        baseRecommendations.suggestedOrder = ['videos', 'articles', 'code', 'blogs'];\n    }\n\n    // Adjust time estimates based on pace preference\n    const timeMultiplier = preferences.pacePreference === 'slow' ? 1.5 : \n                          preferences.pacePreference === 'fast' ? 0.7 : 1;\n    baseRecommendations.estimatedTime = Math.round(45 * timeMultiplier);\n\n    return baseRecommendations;\n  }, [preferences.contentFormat, preferences.pacePreference]);\n\n  const loadAdaptiveRecommendations = useCallback(async () => {\n    try {\n      // This would />;\n    if (style.includes('Hands-on')) return <Gamepad2 className=\"w-4 h-4\" />;\n    if (style.includes('Reading')) return <BookOpen className=\"w-4 h-4\" />;\n    return <Brain className=\"w-4 h-4\" />;\n  };\n\n  const renderPersonalizedHints = () => {\n    if (!showPersonalizedHints || !adaptiveRecommendations) return null;\n\n    return (\n      <motion.div\n        initial={{ opacity:      })}\n              </div>\n            </div>\n\n            {adaptiveRecommendations.personalizedTips.length > 0 && (\n              <div className=\"space-y-2\">\n                <p passingScore: number;\n  questions: any[];\n  userAttempts: ExamAttempt[];\n}\n\ninterface ExamAttempt {\n  id: string;\n  attemptNumber: number;\n  status: 'IN_PROGRESS' | 'SUBMITTED' | 'GRADED';\n       // Navigate to exam taking interface\n        window.open(`/courses/${courseId}/learn/${chapterId}/sections/${sectionId}/exams/${examId}/take/${attempt.id}`, '_blank');\n      }\n    } catch 'bg-gray-100 text-gray-800 border-gray-200';\n    }\n  };\n\n  const getScoreColor = (score: number, passingScore: number) => {\n    if (score >= passingScore) return 'text-green-600';\n    if (score >= passingScore * 0.8) return 'text-yellow-600';\n    return 'text-red-600';\n  };\n\n  if (loading) {\n    return (\n      <div className=\"flex items-center justify-center py-12\">\n        <div \"@/components/ui/badge\";\nimport { Button } from \"@/components/ui/button\";\n\ninterface NotesContentProps {\n  notes: Array<{\n    id: string;\n    title: string;\n    content?: string | null;\n (priority) {\n      case 'high':\n        return 'bg-red-500';\n      case 'medium':\n        return 'bg-yellow-500';\n      case 'low':\n        return 'bg-green-500';\n      default:\n        return = new Date(a.updatedAt || a.createdAt || 0);\n    const bDate = new Date(b.updatedAt || b.createdAt || 0);\n    return bDate.getTime() - aDate.getTime();\n  });\n\n  if (notes.length === 0) {\n {typeConfig.icon}\n                  </div>\n                  <div className=\"flex-1 min-w-0\">\n                    <div className=\"flex items-center gap-2 mb-1\">\n                      <Badge \"@/components/ui/select\";\nimport { cn } from \"@/lib/utils\";\n\ninterface VideoContentProps {\n  videos: Array<{\n    id: string;\n    title: string;\n    description?: string | null;\n    url: VideoContentProps) => {\n  const [sortBy, setSortBy] = useState<'title' | 'rating' | 'duration' | 'views'>('title');\n  const [sortOrder, setSortOrder] = useState<'asc' | 'desc'>('asc');\n  const [filterPlatform, setFilterPlatform] = useState<string>('all');\n  const [filterRating, setFilterRating] = useState<string>('all');\n\n  const formatDuration = (seconds?: number | null) => {\n    if (!seconds) return \"0:00\";\n    const mins = Math.floor(seconds / 60);\n    const secs = seconds % 60;\n    return `${mins}:${secs.toString().padStart(2, '0')}`;\n  };\n\n  const formatViews = (views?: number) => {\n    if (!views) return \"0\";\n    if (views >= 1000000) return `${(views / 1000000).toFixed(1)}M`;\n    if (views >= 1000) return `${(views / 1000).toFixed(1)}K`;\n    return views.toString();\n  };\n\n  const handleVideoClick = (url: string, title: string) => {\n    window.open(url, '_blank', 'noopener,noreferrer');\n  };\n\n  const renderStars = (rating?: number) => {\n    if (!rating) return null;\n    const stars = [];\n    const fullStars = Math.floor(rating);\n    const hasHalfStar = rating % 1 !== 0;\n\n    for (let i = 0; i < 5; i++) {\n      if (i < fullStars) {\n        stars.push(\n          <Star key={i} className=\"w-3 h-3 fill-yellow-400 text-yellow-400\" />\n        );\n      } else if (i === fullStars && hasHalfStar) {\n        stars.push(\n          <Star key={i} className=\"w-3 h-3 fill-yellow-400/50 text-yellow-400\" />\n        );\n      } else {\n        stars.push(\n          <Star key={i} className=\"w-3 h-3 text-gray-300\" />\n        );\n      }\n    }\n    return stars;\n  };\n\n  // Get unique platforms from videos and add common platforms\n  const videoPlatforms = Array.from(new Set(videos.map(v => v.platform).filter((p): p is ...commonPlatforms];\n  const platforms = Array.from(new Set(allPlatforms)).sort();\n\n  // Filter and sort videos\n  const filteredAndSortedVideos = videos\n    .filter(video => {\n      if (filterPlatform !== 'all' && video.platform !== filterPlatform) return false;\n      if (filterRating !== 'all') {\n        const minRating = parseFloat(filterRating);\n        if (!video.rating || video.rating < minRating) return false;\n      }\n      return true;\n    })\n    .sort((a, b) => {\n      let comparison = 0;\n      \n      switch (sortBy) {\n        case 'title':\n          comparison = a.title.localeCompare(b.title);\n          break;\n        case 'rating':\n          comparison = (a.rating || 0) - (b.rating || 0);\n          break;\n        case 'duration':\n          comparison = (a.duration || 0) - (b.duration || 0);\n          break;\n        case 'views':\n          comparison = (a.views || 0) - (b.views || 0);\n          break;\n      }\n      \n      return sortOrder === 'asc' ? comparison : -comparison;\n    });\n\n  if (videos.length === 0) {\n    return (\n      <div className=\"flex flex-col items-center justify-center py-12 text-center\">\n <Select value={filterPlatform} onValueChange={setFilterPlatform}>\n          <SelectTrigger className=\"w-40\">\n            <SelectValue placeholder=\"All Platforms\" />\n          </SelectTrigger>\n <SelectItem value=\"all\">All Ratings</SelectItem>\n            <SelectItem value=\"4\">4+ Stars</SelectItem>\n            <SelectItem value=\"3\">3+ Stars</SelectItem>\n            <SelectItem <SelectContent>\n            <SelectItem value=\"title\">Title</SelectItem>\n            <SelectItem value=\"rating\">Rating</SelectItem>\n            <SelectItem value=\"duration\">Duration</SelectItem>\n            <SelectItem value=\"views\">Views</SelectItem>\n          </SelectContent>\n        </Select>\n\n        {/* Sort Order */}\n        <Button\n </div>\n\n      {/* No Results Message */}\n      {filteredAndSortedVideos.length === 0 && videos.length > 0 && (\n        <div className=\"text-center py-8\">\n          <div className=\"w-12 h-12 chapterId, sectionId, connectWebSocket]);\n\n  // Add system message\n  const addSystemMessage = useCallback((content: string) => {\n    const systemMessage: ChatMessage = {\n      id: message\n      });\n    } catch (error: any) {\n      logger.error('Error sending message:', error);\n    }\n  }, [newMessage, userId, userName, userAvatar, currentSession?.id]);\n\n  // Toggle (videoRef.current) {\n          videoRef.current.srcObject = stream;\n        }\n      } else {\n        if (videoRef.current?.srcObject) {\n          const stream = videoRef.current.srcObject as MediaStream;\n          stream.getTracks().forEach(track => track.stop());\n          videoRef.current.srcObject = null;\n        }\n      }\n      setIsVideoEnabled(!isVideoEnabled);\n      \n      // Update participant status\n      setParticipants(prev => prev.map(p => \n        p.id === userId ? { ...p, isVideoEnabled: !isVideoEnabled } : p\n      ));\n      \n      addSystemMessage(`${userName} ${!isVideoEnabled ? 'enabled' : 'disabled'} video`);\n    } catch (error: any) {\n      logger.error('Error toggling video:', error);\n      toast.error('Failed to access camera');\n    }\n  }, [isVideoEnabled, userId, userName, addSystemMessage]);\n\n  // Toggle audio\n  const toggleAudio = useCallback(async () => {\n    try {\n      setIsAudioEnabled(!isAudioEnabled);\n      \n      // Update participant status\n      setParticipants(prev => prev.map(p => \n        p.id === userId ? { ...p, isAudioEnabled: !isAudioEnabled } : p\n      ));\n      \n      addSystemMessage(`${userName} ${!isAudioEnabled ? userId, userName, addSystemMessage]);\n\n  // Start screen sharing\n  const toggleScreenShare = useCallback(async () => {\n    try {\n      if (!isScreenSharing) {\n        await navigator.mediaDevices.getDisplayMedia({ video: true });\n        addSystemMessage(`${userName} started screen sharing`);\n      } else {\n        addSystemMessage(`${userName} stopped screen sharing`);\n      }\n      setIsScreenSharing(!isScreenSharing);\n      \n      // Update participant status\n      setParticipants(prev => prev.map(p => \n        p.id === userId ? { ...p, }\n  }, [isScreenSharing, userId, userName, addSystemMessage]);\n\n  // Create breakout room\n  const createBreakoutRoom = useCallback(async () => {\n    const roomName = `Room ${breakoutRooms.length + 1}`;\n    const newRoom: BreakoutRoom = {\n      id: `room-${Date.now()}`,\n      name: roomName,\n      participants: [],\n      topic: `Discussion Topic ${breakoutRooms.length + 1}`,\n      timeLimit: 15,\n      createdAt: new Date()\n    };\n\n    setBreakoutRooms(prev => [...prev, newRoom]);\n    addSystemMessage(`Created breakout room: ${roomName}`);\n\n    try {\n      await axios.post('/api/collaboration/breakout-room', {\n        sessionId: currentSession?.id,\n        room: newRoom\n      });\n    } catch (error: any) {\n      logger.error('Error creating breakout room:', error);\n    }\n  }, [breakoutRooms.length, currentSession?.id, addSystemMessage]);\n\n  // Join breakout room\n  const joinBreakoutRoom = useCallback(async (roomId: string) => {\n    const currentUser = participants.find(p => p.id === userId);\n    if (!currentUser) return;\n\n    setBreakoutRooms(prev => prev.map(room => \n      room.id === roomId \n        ? { ...room, participants: [...room.participants, currentUser] }\n        : { ...room, participants: room.participants.filter(p => p.id !== userId) }\n    ));\n\n    const room = breakoutRooms.find(r => r.id === roomId);\n    addSystemMessage(`${userName} joined ${room?.name}`);\n  }, [participants, userId, userName, breakoutRooms, addSystemMessage]);\n\n  // Initialize on mount\n  useEffect(() => {\n    if (isCollaborationOpen && !currentSession) {\n      initializeCollaboration();\n    }\n  }, [isCollaborationOpen, currentSession, initializeCollaboration]);\n\n  // Handle keyboard shortcuts\n  useEffect(() => {\n    const handleKeyPress = (e: KeyboardEvent) => {\n      if (e.key === 'Enter' && !e.shiftKey && activeTab === 'chat') {\n        e.preventDefault();\n        sendMessage();\n };\n  focus: string[];\n  isPublic: boolean;\n  maxMembers: number;\n}\n\nexport const SocialLearningAnalytics = ({\n  courseId,\n  chapterId,\n  sectionId,\n  currentUser,\n  sectionTitle\n}: setDiscussions(getDemoDiscussions());\n      setStudyGroups(getDemoStudyGroups());\n    } finally {\n      setIsLoading(false);\n    }\n  }, [courseId, chapterId, sectionId, currentUser.id]);\n\n  // axios.post(\"/api/sam/collaboration-analytics\", {\n        action: \"create-discussion\",\n        data: {\n          courseId,\n          chapterId,\n          sectionId,\n          userId:   }\n  };\n\n  const getEngagementColor = (level: number) => {\n    if (level >= 80) return \"text-green-600 dark:text-green-400\";\n    if (level >= 60) return \"text-yellow-600     default: return \"bg-gray-100 text-gray-700 dark:bg-gray-900/30 dark:text-gray-400\";\n    }\n  };\n\n  const renderAnalyticsDashboard = () => {\n    if (!collaborationData) return null;\n\n Lightbulb\n} from \"lucide-react\";\nimport { Button } from \"@/components/ui/button\";\nimport { Card, CardContent, CardHeader, CardTitle } from \"@/components/ui/card\";\nimport { Progress } from \"@/components/ui/progress\";\nimport { Badge } from \"@/components/ui/badge\";\nimport { Tabs, TabsContent, TabsList, TabsTrigger } from \"@/components/ui/tabs\";\nimport { cn } from \"@/lib/utils\";\n\ninterface ExamResultsClientProps {\n  params: {\n    courseId: string;\n    chapterId: string;\n    sectionId: string;\n    examId: string;\n    attemptId: string;\n  };\n}\n\ninterface ExamResult {\n  attempt: {\n    id: string;\n    attemptNumber: number;\n    scorePercentage: number;\n    isPassed: boolean;\n    correctAnswers: number;\n    totalQuestions: number;\n    timeSpent: number;\n    submittedAt: string;\n    answers: Array<{\n      id: string;\n      answer: any;\n      isCorrect: boolean;\n      pointsEarned: number;\n      question: {\n        id: string;\n        question: string;\n        questionType: string;\n        points: number;\n        correctAnswer: any;\n        explanation?: string;\n      };\n    }>;\n    exam: {\n      id: string;\n      title: string;\n      passingScore: number;\n      timeLimit?: number;\n    };\n  };\n  summary: {\n    totalQuestions: number;\n    correctAnswers: number;\n    scorePercentage: number;\n    isPassed: boolean;\n    earnedPoints: number;\n    totalPoints: number;\n    timeSpent: number;\n  };\n}\n\nexport default function ExamResultsClient({ params }: ExamResultsClientProps) {\n  const router = useRouter();\n  const [result, setResult] = useState<ExamResult | null>(null);\n  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);\n  const [activeTab, setActiveTab] = useState(\"overview\");\n\n  const fetchResults = useCallback(async () => {\n    try {\n      setLoading(true);\n      const response = await fetch(\n        `/api/courses/sections/${params.sectionId}/exams/${params.examId}/attempts`\n      );\n      if (response.ok) {\n        const attempts = await response.json();\n        const attempt = attempts.find((a: any) => a.id === params.attemptId);\n        if (attempt) {\n          setResult({\n            attempt,\n            summary: {\n              totalQuestions: attempt.totalQuestions,\n              correctAnswers: attempt.correctAnswers,\n              scorePercentage: attempt.scorePercentage,\n              isPassed: attempt.isPassed,\n              earnedPoints: attempt.answers?.reduce((sum: number, a: any) => sum + a.pointsEarned, 0) || 0,\n              totalPoints: attempt.answers?.reduce((sum: number, a: any) => sum + a.question.points, 0) || 0,\n              timeSpent: attempt.timeSpent,\n            },\n          });\n        }\n      }\n    } catch (error: any) {\n      logger.error(\"Error fetching results:\", error);\n    } finally {\n      setLoading(false);\n    }\n  }, [params.sectionId, params.examId, params.attemptId]);\n\n  useEffect(() => {\n    fetchResults();\n  }, [fetchResults]);\n\n  const formatTime = (seconds: number) => {\n    const minutes = Math.floor(seconds / 60);\n    const remainingSeconds = seconds % 60;\n    return `${minutes}m ${remainingSeconds}s`;\n  };\n\n  const getScoreColor = (score: number, passingScore: number) => {\n    if (score >= passingScore) return \"text-green-600\";\n    if (score >= passingScore * 0.8) return \"text-yellow-600\";\n    return \"text-red-600\";\n  };\n\n  const getGrade = (score: number) => {\n    if (score >= 90) return { grade: \"A\", color: \"text-green-600\" };\n    if (score >= 80) return { grade: \"B\", color: \"text-blue-600\" };\n    if (score >= 70) return { grade: \"C\", color: \"text-yellow-600\" };\n    if (score >= 60) return { grade: \"D\", color: \"text-orange-600\" };\n    return { grade: \"F\", color: \"text-red-600\" };\n  };\n\n  if (loading) {\n    return (\n      <div className=\"min-h-screen flex items-center justify-center\">\n        <div className=\"animate-spin rounded-full h-8 w-8 border-b-2 border-blue-600\"></div>\n      </div>\n    );\n  }\n\n  if (!result) {\n    return (\n      <div className=\"min-h-screen flex items-center justify-center\">\n        <div className=\"text-center\">\n          <XCircle className=\"w-16 h-16 text-red-500 mx-auto mb-4\" />\n          <h1 className=\"text-2xl font-bold text-slate-900 mb-2\">Results Not Found</h1>\n          <p className=\"text-slate-600 mb-4\">The exam results could not be loaded.</p>\n          <Button onClick={() => router.back()}>\n            <ArrowLeft className=\"w-4 h-4 mr-2\" />\n            Go Back\n          </Button>\n        </div>\n      </div>\n    );\n  }\n\n  const { attempt, summary } = result;\n  const gradeInfo = getGrade(summary.scorePercentage);\n\n  return (\n    <div className=\"min-h-screen bg-gradient-to-br from-slate-50 to-blue-50 dark:from-slate-900 dark:to-slate-800\">\n      {/* Header */}\n      <div className=\"bg-white/95 dark:bg-slate-900/95 backdrop-blur-sm border-b border-slate-200 dark:border-slate-700\">\n        <div className=\"max-w-7xl mx-auto px-6 py-6\">\n          <div className=\"flex items-center justify-between\">\n            <div className=\"flex items-center gap-4\">\n              <Button\n                variant=\"ghost\"\n                onClick={() => router.push(\n                  `/courses/${params.courseId}/learn/${params.chapterId}/sections/${params.sectionId}`\n                )}\n              >\n                <ArrowLeft className=\"w-4 h-4 mr-2\" />\n                Back to Section\n              </Button>\n              <div>\n                <h1 className=\"text-2xl font-bold text-slate-900 dark:text-slate-100\">\n                  Exam Results\n                </h1>\n                <p className=\"text-slate-600 dark:text-slate-400\">\n                  {attempt.exam.title} - Attempt {attempt.attemptNumber}\n                </p>\n              </div>\n            </div>\n\n            <div className=\"flex gap-2\">\n              <Button\n                variant=\"outline\"\n                onClick={() => router.push(\n                  `/courses/${params.courseId}/learn/${params.chapterId}/sections/${params.sectionId}`\n                )}\n              >\n                <RefreshCw className=\"w-4 h-4 mr-2\" />\n Target,\n  Brain\n} from \"lucide-react\";\nimport { Button } from \"@/components/ui/button\";\nimport { Card, CardContent, CardHeader, CardTitle } from \"@/components/ui/card\";\nimport { Progress } cn } from \"@/lib/utils\";\n\ninterface ExamTakeClientProps {\n  params: {\n    courseId: string;\n    chapterId: string;\n    sectionId: string;\n    examId: string;\n    attemptId: string;\n  };\n}\n\ninterface Question {\n  id: string;\n  question: string;\n  questionType: 'MULTIPLE_CHOICE' | 'TRUE_FALSE' | 'SHORT_ANSWER' | 'ESSAY' | 'FILL_IN_BLANK';\n  options?: any;\n  points: number;\n  order: number;\n  imageUrl?: string;\n  videoUrl?: string;\n}\n\ninterface ExamAttempt {\n  id: string;\n  exam: {\n    id: string;\n    title: string;\n    description?: string;\n    timeLimit?: number;\n    questions: Question[];\n  };\n  startedAt: string;\n  timeSpent?: number;\n  status: string;\n}\n\nexport default function ExamTakeClient({ params }: ExamTakeClientProps) {\n  const router = useRouter();\n  const [attempt, setAttempt] = useState<ExamAttempt | null>(null);\n  const [currentQuestionIndex, setCurrentQuestionIndex] = useState(0);\n  const [answers, setAnswers] = useState<Record<string, any>>({});\n  const [timeRemaining, setTimeRemaining] = useState<number | null>(null);\n  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);\n  const [submitting, setSubmitting] = useState(false);\n  const [flaggedQuestions, setFlaggedQuestions] = useState<Set<string>>(new Set());\n\n  const fetchAttempt = useCallback(async () => {\n    try {\n      setLoading(true);\n      const response = await fetch(\n        `/api/courses/sections/${params.sectionId}/exams/${params.examId}/attempts`\n      );\n      if (response.ok) {\n        const attempts = await response.json();\n        const currentAttempt = attempts.find((a: any) => a.id === params.attemptId);\n        if (currentAttempt) {\n          setAttempt(currentAttempt);\n          // Initialize answers from existing attempt\n          const existingAnswers: Record<string, any> = {};\n          currentAttempt.answers?.forEach((answer: any) => {\n            existingAnswers[answer.questionId] = answer.answer;\n          });\n          setAnswers(existingAnswers);\n        }\n      }\n    } catch (error: any) {\n      logger.error(\"Error fetching attempt:\", error);\n    } finally {\n      setLoading(false);\n    }\n  }, [params.sectionId, params.examId, params.attemptId]);\n\n  useEffect(() => {\n    fetchAttempt();\n  }, [fetchAttempt]);\n\n  useEffect(() => {\n    if (attempt?.exam.timeLimit && timeRemaining === null) {\n      const startTime = new Date(attempt.startedAt).getTime();\n      const now = Date.now();\n      const elapsed = Math.floor((now - startTime) / 1000);\n      const remaining = (attempt.exam.timeLimit * 60) - elapsed;\n      setTimeRemaining(Math.max(0, remaining));\n    }\n  }, [attempt, timeRemaining]);\n\n  const handleAnswerChange = (questionId: string, answer: any) => {\n    setAnswers(prev => ({\n      ...prev,\n      [questionId]: answer\n    }));\n  };\n\n  const toggleFlag = (questionId: string) => {\n    setFlaggedQuestions(prev => {\n      const newSet = new Set(prev);\n      if (newSet.has(questionId)) {\n        newSet.delete(questionId);\n      } else {\n        newSet.add(questionId);\n      }\n      return newSet;\n    });\n  };\n\n  const handleSubmit = useCallback(async () => {\n    if (submitting || !attempt) return;\n\n    setSubmitting(true);\n    try {\n      const answersArray = attempt.exam.questions.map(question => ({\n        questionId: question.id,\n        answer: answers[question.id] || null,\n      }));\n\n      const startTime = new Date(attempt.startedAt).getTime();\n      const timeSpent = Math.floor((Date.now() - startTime) / 1000);\n\n      const response = await fetch(\n        `/api/courses/sections/${params.sectionId}/exams/${params.examId}/attempts/${params.attemptId}/submit`,\n        {\n          method: 'POST',\n          headers: {\n            'Content-Type': 'application/json',\n          },\n          body: JSON.stringify({\n            answers: answersArray,\n            timeSpent,\n          }),\n        }\n      );\n\n      if (response.ok) {\n        const result = await response.json();\n        // Redirect to results page\n        router.push(\n          `/courses/${params.courseId}/learn/${params.chapterId}/sections/${params.sectionId}/exams/${params.examId}/results/${params.attemptId}`\n        );\n      }\n    } catch (error: any) {\n      logger.error(\"Error submitting exam:\", error);\n    } finally {\n      setSubmitting(false);\n    }\n  }, [submitting, attempt, answers, params.sectionId, params.examId, params.attemptId, params.courseId, params.chapterId, router]);\n\n  useEffect(() => {\n    if (timeRemaining !== null && timeRemaining > 0) {\n      const timer = setInterval(() => {\n        setTimeRemaining(prev => {\n          if (prev === null || prev <= 1) {\n            handleSubmit();\n            return 0;\n          }\n          return prev - 1;\n        });\n      }, 1000);\n\n      return () => clearInterval(timer);\n    }\n  }, [timeRemaining, handleSubmit]);\n\n  const formatTime = (seconds: number) => {\n    const minutes = Math.floor(seconds / 60);\n    const remainingSeconds = seconds % 60;\n    return `${minutes}:${remainingSeconds.toString().padStart(2, '0')}`;\n  };\n\n  const getProgress = () => {\n    if (!attempt) return 0;\n    const answered = attempt.exam.questions.filter(q => answers[q.id] !== undefined).length;\n    return (answered / attempt.exam.questions.length) * 100;\n  };\n\n  const renderQuestion = (question: Question) => {\n    const answer = answers[question.id];\n\n    switch (question.questionType) {\n      case 'MULTIPLE_CHOICE':\n        return (\n          <RadioGroup\n            value={answer || \"\"}\n            onValueChange={(value) => handleAnswerChange(question.id, value)}\n          >\n            {question.options?.map((option: string, index: number) => (\n              <div key={index} className=\"flex items-center space-x-2\">\n                <RadioGroupItem value={option} id={`${question.id}-${index}`} />\n                <Label htmlFor={`${question.id}-${index}`} className=\"flex-1 cursor-pointer\">\n                  {option}\n                </Label>\n              </div>\n            ))}\n          </RadioGroup>\n        );\n\n      case 'TRUE_FALSE':\n        return (\n          <RadioGroup\n            value={answer || \"\"}\n            onValueChange={(value) => handleAnswerChange(question.id, value === 'true')}\n          >\n            <div className=\"flex items-center space-x-2\">\n              <RadioGroupItem value=\"true\" id={`${question.id}-true`} />\n              <Label htmlFor={`${question.id}-true`} className=\"cursor-pointer\">True</Label>\n            </div>\n            <div className=\"flex items-center space-x-2\">\n              <RadioGroupItem value=\"false\" id={`${question.id}-false`} />\n              <Label htmlFor={`${question.id}-false`} className=\"cursor-pointer\">False</Label>\n            </div>\n          </RadioGroup>\n        );\n\n      case 'SHORT_ANSWER':\n      case 'FILL_IN_BLANK':\n        return (\n          <Input\n            value={answer || \"\"}\n            onChange={(e) => handleAnswerChange(question.id, e.target.value)}\n            placeholder=\"Enter your answer...\"\n            className=\"w-full\"\n          />\n        );\n\n      case 'ESSAY':\n        return (\n          <Textarea\n            value={answer || \"\"}\n            onChange={(e) => handleAnswerChange(question.id, e.target.value)}\n            placeholder=\"Write your essay here...\"\n            className=\"w-full min-h-[200px]\"\n          />\n        );\n\n      default:\n        return <div>Unsupported question type</div>;\n    }\n  };\n\n  if (loading) {\n    return (\n      <div className=\"min-h-screen flex items-center justify-center\">\n        <div className=\"animate-spin rounded-full h-8 w-8 border-b-2 border-blue-600\"></div>\n      </div>\n    );\n  }\n\n  if (!attempt) {\n    return (\n      <div className=\"min-h-screen flex items-center justify-center\">\n        <div className=\"text-center\">\n          <AlertCircle className=\"w-16 h-16 text-red-500 mx-auto mb-4\" />\n          <h1 className=\"text-2xl font-bold text-slate-900 mb-2\">Exam Not Found</h1>\n          <p className=\"text-slate-600 mb-4\">The exam attempt could not be loaded.</p>\n          <Button onClick={() => router.back()}>\n            <ArrowLeft HTML tags and decode HTML entities\nconst stripHtmlTags = (html: string): string => {\n  if (!html) return '';\n  \n  // Remove HTML tags\n  let text = html.replace(/<[^>]*>/g, '');\n  \n  // Decode common HTML entities\n  const entityMap: { [key: string]: string } = {\n    '&amp;': '&',\n    '&lt;': '<',\n    '&gt;': '>',\n    '&quot;': '\"',\n    '&#x27;': \"'\",\n    '&#x2F;': '/',\n );\n  };\n\n  const getContentIcon = (section: Course['chapters'][0]['sections'][0]) => {\n    if (section.videos.length > 0) return Video;\n    if (section.blogs.length > 0) return BookOpen;\n    if section.user_progress.some(p => p.isCompleted)\n    ).length;\n    \n    return {\n      id: chapter.id,\n      title: chapter.title,\n      total: chapterSections,\n      completed: (completedInChapter / chapterSections) * 100 : 0\n    };\n  });\n\n  // Calculate content type statistics\n  const contentStats = course.chapters.reduce((acc, chapter) => {\n    chapter.sections.forEach(section => {\n      acc.videos += section.videos.length;\n      acc.blogs += section.blogs.length;\n      acc.articles += section.articles.length;\n      acc.notes += section.notes.length;\n      acc.codeExplanations += section.codeExplanations.length;\n    });\n    return acc;\n  }, {\n    videos: 0,\n    blogs: 0,\n    articles: 0,\n    notes: 0,\n    codeExplanations: 0\n  });\n\n  // Calculate estimated completion time\n  const totalMinutes = course.chapters.reduce((acc, chapter) => {\n    return acc + chapter.sections.reduce((sectionAcc, section) => {\n      return sectionAcc + (section.duration || 10);\n    }, 0);\n  }, 0);\n\n  const remainingMinutes = course.chapters.reduce((acc, chapter) => {\n    return acc + chapter.sections.reduce((sectionAcc, section) => {\n      if (!section.user_progress.some(p => p.isCompleted)) {\n        return sectionAcc + (section.duration || 10);\n      }\n      return sectionAcc;\n    }, 0);\n  }, 0);\n\n  const contentTypeItems = [\n    { \n      type: 'Videos', \n      count: contentStats.videos, \n      icon: Video, \n      color: 'text-red-500 bg-red-100 <div className=\"flex items-center justify-between text-sm text-slate-600 dark:text-slate-400\">\n              <span>{completedSections} completed</span>\n              <span>{totalSections - Code,\n  Calendar,\n  Star,\n  TrendingUp\n} from \"lucide-react\";\nimport { Card, CardContent, CardHeader, CardTitle } from \"@/components/ui/card\";\nimport { Badge } from \"@/components/ui/badge\";\nimport { cn } from \"@/lib/utils\";\n\ninterface Course {\n  id: string;\n  chapters: Array<{\n    id: string;\n    title: string;\n    sections: Array<{\n      id: string;\n      title: string;\n      type?: string | null;\n      userProgress: Array<{\n        isCompleted: boolean;\n      }>;\n      videos: Array<{ id: string; title: string }>;\n      blogs: Array<{ id: string; title: string }>;\n      articles: Array<{ id: string; title: string }>;\n      notes: Array<{ id: string; title: string }>;\n      codeExplanations: Array<{ id: string; heading: string }>;\n    }>;\n  }>;\n}\n\ninterface RecentActivityProps {\n  course: Course;\n}\n\nexport const RecentActivity = ({ course }: RecentActivityProps) => {\n  const [isClient, setIsClient] = useState(false);\n  const [clientData, setClientData] = useState<{\n    minutesLearned: number;\n    activities: Array<{\n      id: string;\n      type: 'completion' | 'achievement' | 'milestone';\n      title: string;\n      description: string;\n      timestamp: Date;\n      icon: any;\n      color: string;\n    }>;\n  } | null>(null);\n\n  useEffect(() => {\n    setIsClient(true);\n    \n    // Generate stable random seed based on course ID\n    const seed = course.id.split('').reduce((a, b) => {\n      a = ((a << 5) - a) + b.charCodeAt(0);\n      return a & a;\n    }, 0);\n    \n    // Seeded random function for consistent results\n    const seededRandom = (index: number) => {\n      const x = Math.sin(seed + index) * 10000;\n      return x - Math.floor(x);\n    };\n\n    // Generate recent activities based on completed sections\n    const recentActivities = course.chapters.flatMap((chapter, chapterIndex) =>\n      chapter.sections\n        .filter(section => section.userProgress.some(p => p.isCompleted))\n        .map((section, sectionIndex) => ({\n          id: section.id,\n          type: 'completion' as const,\n          title: `Completed: ${section.title}`,\n          description: `Chapter: ${chapter.title}`,\n          timestamp: new Date(Date.now() - seededRandom(chapterIndex + sectionIndex) * 7 * 24 * 60 * 60 * 1000),\n          icon: CheckCircle2,\n          color: 'text-emerald-500 bg-emerald-100 dark:bg-emerald-900/30'\n        }))\n    ).sort((a, b) => b.timestamp.getTime() - a.timestamp.getTime()).slice(0, 5);\n\n    // Add some engagement activities with stable timestamps\n    const engagementActivities = [\n      {\n        id: 'streak-3',\n        type: 'achievement' as const,\n        title: '3-Day Learning Streak!',\n        description: 'Keep up the momentum',\n        timestamp: new Date(Date.now() - 1 * 24 * 60 * 60 * 1000),\n        icon: Star,\n        color: 'text-yellow-500 bg-yellow-100 dark:bg-yellow-900/30'\n      },\n      {\n        id: 'milestone-25',\n        type: 'milestone' as const,\n        title: '25% Course Progress',\n        description: 'Quarter way there!',\n        timestamp: new Date(Date.now() - 2 * 24 * 60 * 60 * 1000),\n        icon: TrendingUp,\n        color: 'text-blue-500 bg-blue-100 dark:bg-blue-900/30'\n      }\n    ];\n\n    const allActivities = [...recentActivities, ...engagementActivities]\n      .sort((a, b) => b.timestamp.getTime() - a.timestamp.getTime())\n      .slice(0, 6);\n\n    // Generate stable minutes learned based on course progress\n    const completedSections = course.chapters.reduce((acc, chapter) => \n      acc + chapter.sections.filter(section => \n        section.userProgress.some(p => p.isCompleted)\n      ).length, 0);\n    \n    const minutesLearned = Math.floor(seededRandom(1) * 60) + (completedSections * 12) + 60;\n\n    setClientData({\n      minutesLearned,\n      activities: allActivities\n    });\n  }, [course]);\n\n  // Static data for server rendering\n  const staticActivities = course.chapters.flatMap(chapter =>\n    chapter.sections\n      .filter(section => section.userProgress.some(p => p.isCompleted))\n      .map(section => ({\n        id: section.id,\n        type: 'completion' as const,\n        title: `Completed: ${section.title}`,\n        description: `Chapter: ${chapter.title}`,\n        timestamp: new Date('2024-01-01'), // Static timestamp for SSR\n        icon: CheckCircle2,\n        color: 'text-emerald-500 bg-emerald-100 dark:bg-emerald-900/30'\n      }))\n  ).slice(0, 5);\n\n  const allActivities = isClient && clientData ? clientData.activities : staticActivities;\n\n  const formatRelativeTime = (date: Date) => {\n    const now = new Date();\n    const diffInHours = Math.floor((now.getTime() - date.getTime()) / (1000 * 60 * 60));\n    \n    if (diffInHours < 1) return 'Just now';\n    if (diffInHours < 24) return `${diffInHours}h ago`;\n    \n    const diffInDays = Math.floor(diffInHours / 24);\n    if (diffInDays === 1) return 'Yesterday';\n    if (diffInDays < 7) return `${diffInDays}d ago`;\n    \n    return date.toLocaleDateString();\n  };\n\n  const getActivityBadge = (type: string) => {\n    switch (type) {\n      case 'completion':\n        return <Badge variant=\"secondary\" className=\"bg-emerald-100 text-emerald-700 dark:bg-emerald-900/30 dark:text-emerald-300\">Completed</Badge>;\n      case 'achievement':\n        return <Badge variant=\"secondary\" className=\"bg-yellow-100 text-yellow-700 dark:bg-yellow-900/30 dark:text-yellow-300\">Achievement</Badge>;\n      case 'milestone':\n        return <Badge variant=\"secondary\" className=\"bg-blue-100 text-blue-700 dark:bg-blue-900/30 dark:text-blue-300\">Milestone</Badge>;\n      default:\n        return null;\n    }\n  };\n\n  return (\n    <Card className=\"bg-white/80 dark:bg-slate-800/80 backdrop-blur-sm border border-slate-200/50 dark:border-slate-700/50\">\n      <CardHeader>\n        <CardTitle className=\"flex items-center gap-2\">\n          <Activity className=\"w-5 h-5 text-purple-500\" />\n          Recent Activity\n        </CardTitle>\n      </CardHeader>\n      <CardContent>\n        {allActivities.length > 0 ? (\n          <div className=\"space-y-4\">\n            {allActivities.map((activity, index) => (\n              <motion.div\n                key={activity.id}\n                initial={{ opacity: 0, x: -20 }}\n                animate={{ opacity: 1, x: 0 }}\n                transition={{ delay: index * 0.1 }}\n                className=\"flex items-start gap-3\"\n              >\n                <div className={cn(\"p-2 rounded-lg flex-shrink-0\", activity.color)}>\n                  <activity.icon className=\"w-4 h-4\" />\n                </div>\n                \n                <div className=\"flex-1 min-w-0\">\n                  <div className=\"flex items-start justify-between gap-2\">\n                    <div className=\"flex-1 min-w-0\">\n                      <h4 className=\"font-medium text-slate-900 dark:text-slate-100 text-sm\">\n                        {activity.title}\n                      </h4>\n                      <p className=\"text-xs text-slate-600 dark:text-slate-400 mt-1\">\n                        {activity.description}\n                      </p>\n                    </div>\n                    <div className=\"flex flex-col items-end gap-1 flex-shrink-0\">\n                      <span className=\"text-xs text-slate-500 dark:text-slate-400\">\n                        {formatRelativeTime(activity.timestamp)}\n                      </span>\n                      {getActivityBadge(activity.type)}\n                    </div>\n                  </div>\n                </div>\n              </motion.div>\n            ))}\n            \n            {/* Weekly Summary */}\n            <motion.div\n              initial={{ opacity: 0, y: 20 }}\n              animate={{ opacity: 1, y: 0 }}\n              transition={{ delay: 0.6 }}\n              className=\"mt-6 p-4 bg-slate-50/80 dark:bg-slate-700/50 rounded-lg\"\n            >\n              <div className=\"flex items-center gap-2 mb-3\">\n                <Calendar className=\"w-4 h-4 text-slate-600 dark:text-slate-400\" />\n                <h4 className=\"font-medium text-slate-900 dark:text-slate-100 text-sm\">\n                  This Week&apos;s Progress\n                </h4>\n              </div>\n              \n              <div className=\"grid grid-cols-2 gap-4 text-center\">\n                <div>\n                  <p className=\"text-2xl font-bold text-slate-900 dark:text-slate-100\">\n                    {isClient && clientData ? \n                      clientData.activities.filter(a => \n                        a.timestamp > new Date(Date.now() - 7 * 24 * 60 * 60 * 1000)\n                      ).length :\n                      course.chapters.reduce((acc, chapter) => \n                        acc + chapter.sections.filter(section => \n                          section.userProgress.some(p => p.isCompleted)\n                        ).length, 0)\n                    }\n                  </p>\n                  <p className=\"text-xs text-slate-600 dark:text-slate-400\">\n                    Sections Completed\n                  </p>\n                </div>\n                <div>\n                  <p className=\"text-2xl font-bold text-slate-900 dark:text-slate-100\">\n                    {isClient && clientData ? clientData.minutesLearned : 120}\n                  </p>\n                  <p className=\"text-xs text-slate-600 dark:text-slate-400\">\n                    Minutes Learned\n                  </p>\n                </div>\n              </div>\n            </motion.div>\n          </div>\n        ) : (\n          <div className=\"text-center py-8\">\n            <Activity className=\"w-12 h-12 text-slate-400 mx-auto mb-4\" />\n            <h3 className=\"text-lg font-semibold
